name: Equal heights
description: The equal heights pattern is used to provide consistent alignment for grid items within a row format.
usage:
Use this to break down information into columns. A minimum of three columns with subheadings is recommended. Each column can have four items (image, subheading, supporting paragraph, CTA). The image, CTA, and supporting paragraph are optional.

Best practice: To help the page feel visually balanced, try to have the same volume of content for each column.

properties.name: Section rule
properties.description: The rule component indicates the beginning of a new pattern
properties.constraint: Only use the default style for the section-level rule

properties.name: Linked heading
properties.description: The heading can be used as a link when paired with a chevron(›) and a clear indication.

properties.name: Bottom padding
properties.description: The type of padding applied to the bottom of the pattern
